/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/UltraPong.dir/main.cpp.o -o ../bin/UltraPong  ../_deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics.a ../_deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-window.a ../_deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libvorbis.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libogg.so -lpthread -lrt /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libudev.so -ldl
